arts.ttl: Friday’s briefing: Man Utd, Tottenham and Rangers into Europa League last 16
arts.sum: Chloe Kelly returned to Arsenal on loan from Manchester City.

arts.ttl: Kobbie Mainoo drops subtle hint about his Manchester United future
arts.sum: Man Utd won 2-0 against FCSB in the Europa League on Thursday night and Kobbie Mainoo was the star of the show.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim sets ambitious Europa League target for Manchester United
arts.sum: Man Utd are unbeaten in Europe this season and won five successive games in the Europa League to cruise into the last 16.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim reacts to Man Utd win at FCSB
arts.sum: The joy of winning, the feeling of winning, but we will have two [free] weeks to work on our idea and to prepare for the games. We are in the next stage, we are going to prepare for the next stage, but the most important thing now is to recover.

arts.ttl: Amorim after UEL win: Man Utd must target trophy
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim insisted his side must target winning the Europa League after booking their round-of-16 spot with a 2-0 victory at Steaua Bucharest on Thursday.

arts.ttl: Kobbie Mainoo emulates Wayne Rooney feat in Man United's Europa League triumph over FCSB
arts.sum: Manchester United's Kobbie Mainoo emulates Wayne Rooney with a goal and assist in Thursday's 2-0 Europa League league phase triumph over FCSB.

arts.ttl: Kobbie Mainoo: Ruben Amorim agrees with pundit as 'brilliant' Manchester United star shines in new role
arts.sum: The midfielder scored and claimed an assist against FCSB

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim eyeing Europa League title after Man Utd secure last-16 spot
arts.sum: United beat FCSB 2-0 to finish third in the new-look league phase.

arts.ttl: Kobbie Mainoo and Alejandro Garnacho's best positions are revealed by their impressive performances in Bucharest, insists Robbie Savage
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim's men surged to a third consecuctive victory thanks to goals from Diogo Dalot and Mainoo in Bucharest.

arts.ttl: Manchester United, Tottenham learn Europa League fates as four possible last-16 opponents revealed
arts.sum: Manchester United and Tottenham Hotspur discover their four potential opponents for the last 16 of the Europa League after sealing top-eight finishes.
